## Meeting Purpose

[Daily CM standup to discuss progress, blockers, and ongoing projects for GrowthX team members.](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent 6.7-6.9 magnitude earthquake in Jenny's area caused significant disruption; team members expressed concern and support](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Multiple ongoing content projects: Town (new cluster), Sunbit (25 articles), AirByte (website update issues)](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Critical focus on verifying statistics and sources in content creation, especially for articles older than 2 years](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Different CTAs required for B2C (shop directory views) and B2B (partner sign-up) content for Sunbit project](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

## Topics

### Natural Disaster Impact

  - [Jenny experienced a 6.7-6.9 magnitude earthquake yesterday](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Caused power outages and significant fear; some casualties reported](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Team expressed concern and support for Jenny's well-being](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

### Ongoing Projects and Workload

  - [Town:](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [New cluster being worked on](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Saskia aiming to complete 3-4 articles today](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [New strategy prepared by Kyle; smaller meeting scheduled with 4 people](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Sunbit:](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [25 articles to be delivered](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [Automating publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [Different CTAs for B2C (shop directory views) and B2B (partner sign-up)](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [AirByte:](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
      - [Website update caused formatting issues in hundreds of existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
      - [Saskia reviewing and reporting affected articles to Joe](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

### Content Creation Challenges and Tips

  - [Critical importance of verifying statistics and sources](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [AI tends to provide outdated or inaccurate statistics](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [Team advised to trace sources back to original studies](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [Aim for statistics no older than 2 years](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Strategies for handling statistics:](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [Use Google to find original studies](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [Utilize Perplexity to verify AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [Keep 1-2 strong statistics, replace others with general statements](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Soft-linking strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Naturally incorporate links to other relevant articles within content](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Example: mentioning tax deduction articles in money-saving sections](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Team Member Updates

  - [Ehtisham: Preparing for Wednesday customer meetings](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Jenny: Working on Sunbit articles, experimenting with separate chats for each](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Saskia: Completed AirByte work, moving on to Town articles; off work Thursday and Friday](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

  - [Attend upcoming smaller meeting with Town team to discuss new strategy](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Maintain vigilance in verifying statistics and sources for all content](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Saskia to merge her work with Ehtisham's basic skeleton for Prophecy project when time allows](https://fathom.video/share/1vrhZvdDykePfAn-DKAA11erqmybmqnS?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
